title: Squirrel Removal in Greenburgh, NY | $900 – $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Greenburgh, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion, and damage repair. Call Best Pest Control NYC for fast squirrel control solutions.
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Greenburgh, where tree-lined neighborhoods and older homes provide perfect access points to attics and crawl spaces. Our professional squirrel removal services protect Greenburgh residents from property damage, noise, and health risks associated with squirrel infestations. Best Pest Control NYC offers humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and damage restoration throughout Westchester County.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Greenburgh homeowners for years with proven squirrel removal expertise tailored to Westchester's unique residential architecture. Our licensed technicians provide fast response times, humane wildlife solutions, and comprehensive warranties to ensure squirrels don't return to your property.
localContext: Greenburgh's mix of historic homes, modern developments like Edgemont, and properties near Ardsley Road and Central Avenue are particularly vulnerable to squirrel intrusions during fall and winter months. The area's mature oak and maple trees provide ideal habitats that often lead squirrels to seek shelter in nearby attics, chimneys, and soffits.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Greenburgh?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Greenburgh typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and cleanup of contaminated insulation if needed.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Greenburgh attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, visible entry holes near the roofline, chewed wood or wires, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roof. Greenburgh homes with older construction or nearby trees are especially susceptible.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Greenburgh humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. We relocate squirrels when appropriate and focus on exclusion techniques to prevent re-entry without harming the animals.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Greenburgh?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Greenburgh take 3-7 days from initial trapping to complete exclusion. The timeline depends on the number of squirrels, accessibility of entry points, and whether babies are present. We provide same-day or next-day service for emergency situations.
